112 M1C M1C_STAGE_3_ULCER 31c(M1c)Ulcers - Stage 3 CHAR 1 A count of the number of stage 3 ulcers, regardless of cause, on any part of the body. Stage 3 is defined as a full thickness loss of skin layers exposing the subcutaneous tissues. Presents as a deep crater with or without undermining adjacent
